settings.section_description: Create your favourite Korean make-up look with the new Eye Color Palette from AMUSE! It comes in a warm and cool tone palette.

settings.desc_1: Say goodbye to greasy and clumpy finishes with this innovative formula, which features silica powder to absorb excess sebum and leave you with a long-lasting, matte finish.
settings.desc_2: This sun serum is designed to elevate your skincare routine to new heights, ensuring your skin stays shielded, radiant, and youthful.
